headline: How Dual DARPA and German Optics Wins At RTX (RTX) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late February 2026, RTX’s BBN Technologies won a DARPA XENA research contract and Raytheon ELCAN secured a customized Specter DR 1–4x sight production deal for the German Armed Forces, extending RTX’s role in advanced sensing and soldier modernization across the U.S. and Europe. Together, these wins highlight how RTX’s mix of cutting-edge defense research and long-serving optical systems can tie next-generation capabilities to existing NATO procurement programs. We’ll now examine how...

headline: Defense Stocks Like RTX Corp Look Attractive to Value Investors and OTM Option Plays
summary: Defense stocks like RTX Corp, parent of Raytheon, Collins, and Pratt & Whitney, look attractive to value buyers. Short sellers are selling out-of-the-money RTX puts and calls, as they have high premiums.

headline: RTX Stock Just Hit New All-Time Highs Amid Iran War. How Much Higher Can It Go?
summary: RTX (RTX) recently hit new all-time highs of $214.50 and has robust technical momentum. RTX has gained nearly 63% over the past year. The stock maintains a 100% “Buy” technical opinion from Barchart. Analyst sentiment is mixed. Some see RTX as overvalued or a “Hold” at current levels. Author’s Note:...

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think RTX (RTX) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), RTX (RTX) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Iran Conflict Boosts Defense Stocks, But Not Rheinmetall
summary: Conflict in Iran has been a boon for defense stocks.  The German company has been the sector’s star performer in recent years, but its shares have given up much of their gains for 2026.  The once-obscure maker of ammunition and tanks became one of the world’s most valuable defense manufacturers last year, boosted by a wave of European military spending following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine.

headline: DAL, UAL, CCL Tank, While LMT, RTX, OXY Gain Overnight As Oil Nears $120: Trump Dismisses Market Panic As 'Small Price' For Peace
